zh.homeIntro1: 2019年6月22日，一位自称来自2060年的网友在豆瓣「苏珊米勒」小组发起了一场问答。这位网友使用繁体字，ID为「KFK」，声称自己出生于2020年的上海静安区，通过某种非肉身的方式回到了2019年。
zh.homeIntro2: 在短短的时间内，KFK回答了281个问题，涵盖地缘政治、科技发展、气候灾害、社会变迁、哲学信仰等多个领域。他/她给出了许多具体的时间节点和预测，其中一些在此后数年间陆续被现实印证。
zh.homeIntro3: 无论KFK的真实身份如何，这些预言已经成为中文互联网上最引人关注的「未来人」事件之一。本站整理了全部281条问答，并对已到期的预言进行了真实度评估。
zh.coreQuote: 「如能在2019年学会把专注力从物质转入精神信仰，到2048-2060年就不会那么痛苦。」
keyPointsList: 2035年 —— 全息交互游戏出现，语言障碍消除
2038年 —— 强人工智能量化生产
2048年 —— 全球战争爆发，通讯超越G时代
sourceList: 预言原文来源于豆瓣「苏珊米勒」小组 KFK 用户发帖，发布于2019年6月22日（豆瓣原帖）
验证评价基于公开新闻报道和统计数据
编者观点不代表学术定论

en.homeIntro1: On June 22, 2019, an anonymous user claiming to be from the year 2060 started a Q&A session in a Douban (Chinese social media) group. Using traditional Chinese characters and the ID "KFK", they claimed to have been born in Shanghai's Jing'an district in 2020 and traveled back to 2019 through a non-physical means.
en.homeIntro2: In a short time, KFK answered 281 questions covering geopolitics, technology, climate disasters, social changes, philosophy, and spirituality. They provided many specific timelines and predictions, some of which have been confirmed by real-world events in the years since.
en.homeIntro3: Regardless of KFK's true identity, these prophecies have become one of the most discussed "future person" events on the Chinese internet. This site compiles all 281 Q&A entries and evaluates the accuracy of predictions whose deadlines have passed.
en.coreQuote: "If you can learn to shift your focus from material pursuits to spiritual faith in 2019, you won't suffer as much by 2048-2060."
keyPointsList: 2035 —— Holographic interactive games emerge, language barriers eliminated
2048 —— Global war erupts, communications transcend the 'G' era
sourceList: Original prophecies sourced from a Douban 'Susan Miller' group post by user KFK, published June 22, 2019 (Original Post)
Verification based on public news reports and statistical data
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus
